def solve(chunks, queries)
  s = chunks.join('')
  n = s.length
  words = []
  current_word = ""

  def is_letter?(char)
    char >= 'a' && char <= 'z'
  end

  i = 0
  while i < n
    char = s[i]

    if is_letter?(char)
      current_word += char
      i += 1
    elsif char == '-'
      prev_char = (i > 0) ? s[i-1] : nil
      next_char = (i < n - 1) ? s[i+1] : nil
      
      is_valid_hyphen = is_letter?(prev_char) && is_letter?(next_char)

      if is_valid_hyphen
        current_word += char
        i += 1
      else
        # Hyphen acts as a separator
        if current_word.length > 0
          words << current_word
          current_word = ""
        end
        # Skip the invalid hyphen
        i += 1 
      end
    else
      # Any other character acts as a separator
      if current_word.length > 0
        words << current_word
        current_word = ""
      end
      # Skip the separator character
      i += 1
    end
  end

  # Flush the last word
  words << current_word if current_word.length > 0

  # Count queries
  word_counts = Hash.new(0)
  words.each do |word|
    word_counts[word] += 1
  end

  # Generate results
  ans = []
  queries.each do |query|
    ans << word_counts[query]
  end
  
  return ans
end
